name: profile-suggest persists an operator decline so the next session does not re-prompt with the same suggestion
command: mkdir -p repo && printf '{"name":"x"}\n' > repo/package.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/profile-suggest/scan.sh" --root repo --decline --state .claude-tdd-pro/profile-suggest-state.json 2>err.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/profile-suggest/scan.sh" --root repo --state .claude-tdd-pro/profile-suggest-state.json 2>out.txt && grep -q 'declined=true' out.txt && grep -q 'no_prompt' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
